contracts.name: StrongDLE
nonclaims: No converse from current no-live status alone.
No untyped or provenance-free DLE certification.
contracts.typed_signature: StrongDLE(R,c,r,x,tr) iff WasLive(R,c,r,x) and NoLive(R,c,r,x) and DLETransitionProvenance(tr,c,r,x).

contracts.name: NonInterferingResidualPersistence
nonclaims: No persistence under deletion, rewrite, retyping, or identity loss.
contracts.typed_signature: LiveResidual(R0,q) and NonInterferingDLE(tr,q) and Apply(tr,R0)=R1 imply LiveResidual(R1,q).

contracts.name: ResidualTypeSeparation
nonclaims: An explicit admissible translation may discharge the separation premise.
contracts.typed_signature: ResidualType(q1) != ResidualType(q2) and not AdmissibleTranslation(q1,q2) imply not Interchangeable(q1,q2).

contracts.name: AdmissibleModelPairNonEliminability
nonclaims: No result for inadmissible or label-only model pairs.
No completeness claim for all non-eliminability witnesses.
contracts.typed_signature: AdmissibleModelPair(M1,M2,S) and AgreeOn(M1,M2,S) and LiveResidual(M1,q) != LiveResidual(M2,q) imply NonEliminableFrom(q,S).

contracts.name: MinimalSingleResidualObstruction
nonclaims: Sufficiency only; no converse and no checker-completeness claim.

contracts.name: HistoricalTokenNonconversion
nonclaims: Historical evidence remains evidential; it is not erased.
Fresh activation is a separate typed event, not an archive export.
contracts.typed_signature: HistoricalToken(t) and not FreshActivation(t,t2) imply not CurrentLiveGuardToken(t2).
